Name: route-get-json

Name: thread-safe-download
Pitfall: Always use Lock for shared state; daemon=True so threads die with app
Keywords: flask threading lock thread safe download background task

Name: task-id-management
Pattern: Generate and track async task IDs
Code:
import uuid
task_id = str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
with lock:
    progress_store[task_id] = {'status': 'starting', 'percent': 0}
# In worker:
with lock:
    progress_store[task_id] = {'status': 'downloading', 'percent': pct}
Pitfall: Clean up old tasks periodically (2h TTL); store grows unbounded otherwise
Keywords: task id uuid progress store tracking async

Name: stream-proxy
Pattern: Proxy external stream with Range header support
Pitfall: Must forward Range header for video seeking; set correct Content-Type
Keywords: flask stream proxy range header video content type

Name: cors-setup
Code: from flask_cors import CORS\nCORS(app, resources={r'/api/*': {'origins': ['http://localhost:3000']}})
Pitfall: Never use origins='*' in production; whitelist specific ports
Keywords: flask cors cross origin allow localhost

Name: blueprint-modular
Code:
# routes/search.py
from flask import Blueprint
search_bp = Blueprint('search', __name__)

@search_bp.route('/api/search', methods=['POST'])
def search():
    ...

# app.py
from routes.search import search_bp
app.register_blueprint(search_bp)
Pitfall: Each blueprint in separate file; register in main app.py
Keywords: flask blueprint modular routes separate file register

Name: ytdlp-extract-info
Code:
import yt_dlp
opts = {
    'quiet': True,
    'no_warnings': True,
    'ffmpeg_location': FFMPEG_DIR,
    'extract_flat': 'in_playlist'  # Fast mode for search
}
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL(opts) as ydl:
    info = ydl.extract_info(url, download=False)
Pitfall: extract_flat is fast but lacks upload_date; full extraction is slow; always set ffmpeg_location
Keywords: ytdlp yt-dlp extract info metadata search video

Name: ytdlp-progress-hook
Pattern: Track download progress via yt-dlp hooks

Keywords: ytdlp yt-dlp progress hook download callback percent speed eta

Name: subtitle-cache-arch

Name: default-save-dir

Name: error-status-codes
Pattern: Standard HTTP error status code usage
Code:
# 400 - Bad request (missing/invalid params)
return jsonify({'error': 'param is required'}), 400
# 404 - Not found
return jsonify({'error': 'Video not found'}), 404
# 429 - Rate limited
return jsonify({'error': 'rate_limited', 'retry_after': seconds}), 429
# 500 - Server error
return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
Pitfall: Always include error key in JSON; 429 should include retry_after
Keywords: error status code 400 404 429 500 jsonify

Name: ignoreerrors-batch
Code:
opts = {
    'ignoreerrors': True,  # Skip failed entries in playlist/search
    'quiet': True,
    'extract_flat': 'in_playlist'
}
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL(opts) as ydl:
    results = ydl.extract_info(f'ytsearch10:{query}', download=False)
    entries = [e for e in (results.get('entries') or []) if e]  # Filter None
Pitfall: Always filter None entries after ignoreerrors; needed for trending/search
Keywords: ytdlp ignoreerrors batch search trending filter none

Name: ffmpeg-detection
Pitfall: Check PATH first then WinGet path; set ffmpeg_location in yt-dlp opts
Keywords: ffmpeg detect find path windows winget location

Name: sqlite-connection-tuning
Pattern: SQLite connection tuned for concurrent Flask/gunicorn (WAL + busy_timeout)
Code:
def _get_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB_PATH)
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    conn.execute('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
    conn.execute('PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000')
    return conn
Pitfall: 默认无 WAL/timeout 时 gunicorn 多 worker 并发写易 database is locked；journal_mode=WAL 库级持久(设一次即可) 而 busy_timeout 须每连接设；手动事务用 isolation_level=None 勿与隐式 BEGIN 混用。样板 guji-reader app.py _get_db
Keywords: sqlite wal busy_timeout database is locked flask gunicorn connection concurrency pragma 并发 锁
